case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LUIS HUMBERTO MIRANDA SUAREZ

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST.
